title: Cleft Sentences
description: Use It-clefts (It was Maria that solved it), Wh-clefts / pseudo-clefts (What I need is a break) and All-clefts (All I want is peace) to focus attention on one element — a powerful tool for contrast, correction, and emphasis in formal English.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (cleft sentences: it-clefts and wh-clefts, Units 109–110)
